When you use a skill you will end up in that skill's resulting stance, visible as an icon next to the skill's name.  When in a new stance, you will have access to new skills.  You can use a skill that will return you to the original stance, or even another, previously unavailable stance.
translation: 当你使用一个技能后，你将进入该技能对应的姿态，姿态会以图标形式显示在技能名称旁。进入新姿态后，你将能够使用新的技能。你可以使用一个技能回到原先的姿态，甚至切换到另一个之前无法使用的姿态。

original: When your health or stamina is reduced, you will accrue penalties to your statistics.  To see these penalties, highlight your character portrait.  The icons next to your health and stamina bars will also indicate that this has occurred.  Recover health or stamina to remove these penalties.
translation: 当你的生命值或体力值降低时，你的属性值会累积减值。要查看这些减值，请将光标悬停在角色肖像上。生命条和体力条旁边的图标也会提示出现了减值。恢复生命值或体力值以移除这些减值。

original: When you enter a grapple with an opponent, your available skills are limited by stamina and your current grapple status, indicated above.  Struggling or grappling with the enemy can improve your grapple status - but they will use skills that will have the opposite effect!
translation: 当你与对手进入缠斗状态时，你可用的技能将受限于体力值和当前的缠斗状态（如上所示）。与敌人挣扎或缠斗可以改善你的缠斗状态—但他们也会使用技能产生相反的效果！

original: When you run out of stamina or stability, you will fall to the ground!  While attempting to get to your feet, you can transition through multiple stances, including Hands-and-Knees and Kneeling stance, and your available skills are limited by your current stamina and stability.
translation: 当你的体力值或稳定性耗尽时，你会摔倒在地！试图起身时，你可以经过多个姿态过渡，包括手膝跪地和跪立姿态，而你可用的技能将受限于当前的体力值和稳定性。

original: When you run out of weapon grip, your weapon will be disarmed! The disarmed weapon is now in your item list, and can be re-equipped by "using" it.
translation: 当你的武器握持度耗尽时，你的武器会被缴械！被缴械的武器会出现在你的物品列表中，可以通过"使用"它重新装备。

original: Strength determines raw attack power, which affects damage, how much attacks unbalance an enemies, and contests of strength, such as wrestling, struggling, or weapon locks. CAUTION: high strength attracts werewolves!

original: Endurance determines stamina and resilience, which affects your ability to keep up an assault without getting tired, your ability to shrug off low damage attacks, and wear heavier armor without becoming exhausted.
translation: 耐力决定了体力和韧性，影响你在不疲劳的情况下持续攻击的能力、承受低伤害攻击的能力，以及穿戴更重盔甲而不筋疲力尽的能力。

original: Agility determines balance and skill, affecting your ability to keep a sure footing even while doing acrobatic maneuvers, getting unblockable attacks against enemies, and evading enemy attacks.
translation: 敏捷决定了平衡和技巧，影响你在做杂技动作时保持稳定脚步的能力、对敌人发动不可格挡的攻击，以及躲避敌人攻击的能力。

original: Perception determines your ability to see what attacks an enemy may use next and prepare accordingly, as well as your base scouting ability, which determines what information you can see about upcoming areas.
translation: 感知决定了你能提前看清敌人下一步可能使用什么攻击并做好准备的能力，以及你的基础侦查能力，这决定了你能看到前方区域哪些信息。

original: Magic determines your magical capabilities, such as how powerful magic spells are, and how many of them you can cast before becoming magically exhausted.
translation: 魔力决定了你的魔法能力，比如法术的威力，以及在魔力耗尽前能施展多少次魔法。

original: Charisma determines your ability to influence an enemy, getting them to calm down and listen to reason, enraging them, or seducing them.
